description: MOTIVATED SELLER & PRICED TO SELL well below Assessment! This LUXURY END UNIT home, shows like NEW. 2,318 SF of modern living w/ 4 beds, 4 baths, Open concept main floor with Large Living & Dining Area, Family Rm, HUGE Quartz Island, walk-in pantry, chef-inspired kitchen w/Gas Stove. Large, fully fenced yard, plus 2 balconies with south-facing deck with BBQ gas hookup. Upstairs has 3 generous size beds, w/Primary feat. walk-in closet, his/her sinks & massive 6 pc spa-like ensuite, Double sink in Main Bath & full laundry area. BONUS: Separate entry to INDEPENDENT LIVING AREA w/Rec Rm, Bedroom & Full Bath perfect for extended family or Nanny. Side by Side Garage + 2 on driveway, all in a cool comfortable A/C Home. Minutes away to Shops, Highways, Buses & top schools: SEAQUAM (IB). Pets OK.
